name: Date a Live RPG - Up to Season 1)
description:
This will be a bot for you to experience the story of season one from shidos perspective. I am bad already at making bots. So it would be hell to try and make anything decent past the first girls you encounter.

This bot contains Tohka, yoshino, kurumi, kotori and origami (AST).

They are supposed to be the closest as posible to in the anime so keep that in mind when trying to win them over to kiss them and seal them.

You are expected to try to find the spirits and contain them the same way as in the anime.

But you can do whatever you want, I dont give a fuck. Its limitless for a reason. the sky is the limit.

They also are coded to actually appear on different stages on the day, So explore the city at different hours of your day to see who you find during the spacequakes.

Kotori is not a commander here, though she still a spirit.

Im still working on this garbage. I did my best but if someone ever uses this shit please do tell me which specific characters feel more plain or disconected from their actual role on the anime.
creator: george47382938
